en.literal:
This group covers craft and trade occupations not classified elsewhere in Major Group 7: Craft and Related Trades Workers.  For instance, the group includes those who mould, slice, grind and polish optical lenses and those who arrange flowers for display.
In such cases tasks would include -
(a) heating, moulding and pressing optical glass to make lens blanks;
(b) grinding and polishing lens blanks.
Examples of the occupations classified here:
-  Flower arranger
-  Optical lens finisher
-  Optical lens moulder

self.title: Craft and related workers not elsewhere classified
